name: Hawaii Surfing Academy
tagline: Instructor Jimmy has 40+ years of surfing and free drone footage of every lesson — the best value surf school in Waikiki.
price: $$ — Group lesson ~$75, private ~$150 (2 hrs, board + rash guard + reef shoes + photos + drone video all included)
parking: Meet at Waikiki Beach; park at Kapiolani Park or Zoo lot
bestTime: Morning sessions for cleanest conditions; afternoon for warmer water
talkStory: Founded in 2014 by Jimmy, a local surfer with 40+ years of wave experience who started teaching in 1978, Hawaii Surfing Academy is the best value proposition in Waikiki surf lessons. Every single lesson includes professional surf photos AND drone video footage from their in-house pilot Nani — most schools charge $50+ extra for that. They teach at uncrowded beginner spots in Waikiki and also run North Shore sessions at Haleiwa and Punaluu for students who want a different vibe. Group bookings are exclusive to your party, meaning you never get lumped with strangers. Families rave about the patience with kids as young as 5. The gear package is comprehensive — board, rash guard, wetsuit, and reef shoes all included.
